label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's business or channel strategy

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction of entity or product market success

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity or prediction

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity or fitness

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative performance comparison against peers

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistic or pricing data

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment by Aberdeen analysts

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Systematic analysis of industry structure

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Detailed comparison of competing entities

label: Benchmarking
definition: Comparison via Pro/Engineer, CADalyst, Ansys benchmarks

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of vendor documents and product specs

label: Field Research
definition: Primary interviews with IT managers and VAR community

label: High Confidence
definition: Strong evidentiary basis; benchmark data or direct vendor statement

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Reasonable basis with analyst judgment

label: Low Confidence
definition: Directional judgment with limited evidence

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events

label: Mature
definition: Technology widely deployed and stable

label: Emerging
definition: Technology gaining adoption

label: Obsolete
definition: Technology no longer active

label: Active
definition: Technology currently in use
